response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the 15-year experience minimum with 19 years of diverse technical work and demonstrates solid engineering credentials, they lack the critical specialized AI expertise required for this director-level AI strategy role. Current AI exposure (MCP infrastructure at re:cinq, started April 2025) is recent and appears infrastructure-focused rather than strategic. No evidence of building AI products, published AI research, or advising customers on AI adoption. The role requires demonstrated expertise in AI strategy and innovation; this candidate's strength is full-stack and infrastructure engineering.
strengths: Meets 15-year minimum with 19 years of progressive engineering experience across multiple domains
Founder of GISCollective platform demonstrates entrepreneurial thinking and ability to build systems from scratch
Recently engaged with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing awareness of cutting-edge AI infrastructure
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in AI/ML—resume lacks evidence of building AI products, training models, or published AI work despite job asking for 'recognized expertise in AI'
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD), particularly in AI-related field, which is preferred for this specialized role
Career trajectory shows senior/staff-level IC roles but no evidence of director-level strategic influence, customer advisory, or innovation leadership required for this director-level position
